name: Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited
summary: Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited, an investment holding company, provides entertainment and hospitality services. The company operates through Gaming Operation and Hotel Operation segments. Its flagship project is Grand Emperor Hotel located in Macau that is a gaming hotel, which offers various facilities covering restaurants and bars, a business centre, a functional venue, a Thai Spa, a sauna house, and a nightclub, as well as VIP rooms, gaming concourses, and slot machines. The Grand Emperor Hotel consists of 67 tables in the gaming concourse; a VIP room with 10 tables; slot machines with a capacity of 180 slot seats; and 311 guest rooms. It also operates the Inn Hotel Macau with 287 guest rooms located at Taipa Island, Macau. In addition, it offers travel agency and project financing services; catering services; and gaming-related marketing, public relation, and promotion services, as well as agency services for gaming operation. The company was formerly known as Emperor (China Concept) Investments Ltd. and changed its name to Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited in January 2005. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited is a subsidiary of Emperor Entertainment Hotel Holdings Limited.
